body:
## Notes:
- Since version 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does **not** support **Vulkan 1.2**, please do **not** use the **Vulkan backend** to launch the latest version of Minecraft.

## Updates:
- [GP#1169](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1169): Synced translations from [Weblate project](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/)
- [GP#1136](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1136): Display download speed for download tasks (by MovTery)
- [GP#1151](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1151): Clicking on a screenshot in the screenshot manager opens it with the system image viewer (by youfeng11)
- [GP#1152](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1152): Check for content count changes when returning to Content Manager to auto-refresh the list (by MovTery)
- [GP#1160](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1160): Updated launcher to support using multi-cloud storage links (by MovTery)
- [GP#1161](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1161): Apply fullscreen to launch extraction page according to settings (by youfeng11)
- [GP#1143](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1143): Added JVM keep-alive foreground service (by MovTery)

## Changes:
- [GP#1145](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1145): Only use default name when the name is empty when modifying/adding a server (by MovTery)
- [GP#1146](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1146): Adjusted prompt text color for overwriting an existing version installation (by MovTery)
- [GP#1147](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1147): Automatically select the newly added account when adding an account (by MovTery)
- [GP#1162](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1162): Adjusted theme configuration for the Terracotta multiplayer menu (by MovTery)

## Fixes:
- [Main#71125970](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/commit/7112597021a0b6ad9ddde7bac3933b840cef77c6), [Main#20054dac](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/commit/20054dac5b12da4b4236c2a92c726fdfad3cd5a6): Reverted changes that caused display anomalies on some devices (by MovTery)
- [GP#1133](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1133): 26.2 snapshot4 failing to run (by MovTery)
- [GP#1137](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1137): Added path traversal check for filename legality validation (by MovTery)
- [GP#1142](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1142): Activity configuration issue causing multiple launcher instances to exist (by MovTery)
- [GP#1149](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1149): UI anomalies on some devices when entering fullscreen (by MovTery)
- [GP#1150](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1150): Launch extraction page should ignore Java runtime environments not supported by the current device (by MovTery)
- [GP#1165](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1165): Replaced domestic mirror API domain within China (by leemwood)
